---
title: "Zip_Population"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
# Florida Zip Code Population Data (1985-2022) with State-Level Scaling

library(tidyverse)
library(tidycensus)
library(zoo)

# Load Census API key
#census_api_key("YOUR_CENSUS_API_KEY")

state_abbr <- "FL"

# Function to get ACS population data
get_zip_population_acs <- function(year) {
  tryCatch({
    population_data <- get_acs(
      geography = "zip code tabulation area",
      variables = "B01003_001",
      year = year,
      state = state_abbr,
      survey = "acs5"
    )
    
    population_data <- population_data %>%
      select(GEOID, NAME, estimate) %>%
      rename(
        zip_code = GEOID,
        zip_name = NAME,
        population = estimate
      ) %>%
      mutate(year = year, data_source = "ACS 5-year")
    
    return(population_data)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("Error retrieving ACS data for year", year, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Function to get Decennial Census data
get_zip_population_decennial <- function(year) {
  tryCatch({
    if (year == 2000) {
      var_name <- "P001001"
    } else if (year == 2010) {
      var_name <- "P001001"
    } else {
      stop("Only 2000 and 2010 are supported for zip code data")
    }
    
    population_data <- get_decennial(
      geography = "zip code tabulation area",
      variables = var_name,
      year = year,
      state = state_abbr
    )
    
    population_data <- population_data %>%
      select(GEOID, NAME, value) %>%
      rename(
        zip_code = GEOID,
        zip_name = NAME,
        population = value
      ) %>%
      mutate(year = year, data_source = paste("Decennial Census", year))
    
    return(population_data)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("Error retrieving Decennial data for year", year, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Function to get state-level population from Census API
get_state_population_api <- function(year) {
  tryCatch({
    if (year == 2000) {
      var_name <- "P001001"
      data_source <- "Decennial Census 2000"
    } else if (year == 2010) {
      var_name <- "P001001"
      data_source <- "Decennial Census 2010"
    } else if (year == 2020) {
      var_name <- "P1_001N"
      data_source <- "Decennial Census 2020"
    } else {
      return(NA)
    }
    
    state_pop <- get_decennial(
      geography = "state",
      variables = var_name,
      year = year,
      state = state_abbr
    ) %>%
      pull(value)
    
    message(paste("✓ State population for", year, ":", state_pop, "-", data_source))
    return(state_pop)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("✗ Error retrieving state population for year", year, ":", e$message))
    return(NA)
  })
}

# Try ACS years - test which ones work
message("Testing ACS years to find what works...")
test_years <- c(2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019)
working_years <- c()

for (year in test_years) {
  test_result <- get_zip_population_acs(year)
  if (!is.null(test_result) && nrow(test_result) > 0) {
    working_years <- c(working_years, year)
    message(paste("✓ Year", year, "works"))
  }
}

message(paste("\nWorking ACS years:", paste(working_years, collapse = ", ")))

# Retrieve ACS data for working years only
if (length(working_years) > 0) {
  message("\nRetrieving ACS 5-year estimates...")
  acs_data <- map_df(working_years, get_zip_population_acs)
} else {
  message("No ACS data retrieved. Will use Decennial Census only.")
  acs_data <- NULL
}

# Attempt to retrieve Decennial Census data for 2000, 2010
message("\nAttempting to retrieve Decennial Census zip-level data...")
decennial_list <- list()

message("Attempting 2000 Decennial Census...")
decennial_2000 <- get_zip_population_decennial(2000)
if (!is.null(decennial_2000) && nrow(decennial_2000) > 0) {
  message("✓ Successfully retrieved 2000 data")
  decennial_list[[length(decennial_list) + 1]] <- decennial_2000
} else {
  message("⚠ 2000 data not available via API")
}

message("Attempting 2010 Decennial Census...")
decennial_2010 <- get_zip_population_decennial(2010)
if (!is.null(decennial_2010) && nrow(decennial_2010) > 0) {
  message("✓ Successfully retrieved 2010 data")
  decennial_list[[length(decennial_list) + 1]] <- decennial_2010
} else {
  message("⚠ 2010 data not available via API")
}

# Combine decennial data
if (length(decennial_list) > 0) {
  decennial_data <- bind_rows(decennial_list)
} else {
  message("ERROR: No Decennial Census data retrieved!")
  decennial_data <- NULL
}

# Combine all observed data
if (!is.null(acs_data) && !is.null(decennial_data)) {
  florida_zip_observed <- bind_rows(acs_data, decennial_data) %>%
    arrange(zip_code, year) %>%
    distinct(zip_code, year, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(zip_code = as.character(zip_code))
} else if (!is.null(decennial_data)) {
  florida_zip_observed <- decennial_data %>%
    arrange(zip_code, year) %>%
    distinct(zip_code, year, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(zip_code = as.character(zip_code))
} else if (!is.null(acs_data)) {
  florida_zip_observed <- acs_data %>%
    arrange(zip_code, year) %>%
    distinct(zip_code, year, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(zip_code = as.character(zip_code))
} else {
  stop("No data retrieved from any source!")
}

# ============================================
# Step 2: Get State-Level Population Trends
# ============================================

message("\nRetrieving state-level population data from Census API...")

# Get from API for years 2000, 2010, 2020
state_pop_data <- tibble(
  year = c(2000, 2010, 2020),
  state_population = NA_real_
)

for (i in 1:nrow(state_pop_data)) {
  year <- state_pop_data$year[i]
  pop <- get_state_population_api(year)
  state_pop_data$state_population[i] <- pop
}

state_pop_data <- state_pop_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(state_population)) %>%
  arrange(year)

message("\nState population data (observed from Census API):")
print(state_pop_data)

# ============================================
# Step 2.5: Interpolate and Extrapolate State Population
# ============================================

message("\nInterpolating and extrapolating state population...")

# Calculate growth rates for extrapolation
pop_2000 <- state_pop_data$state_population[state_pop_data$year == 2000]
pop_2010 <- state_pop_data$state_population[state_pop_data$year == 2010]
pop_2020 <- state_pop_data$state_population[state_pop_data$year == 2020]

# Growth rate from 2000 to 2010
growth_rate_2000_2010 <- (pop_2010 / pop_2000) ^ (1/10) - 1

# Growth rate from 2010 to 2020
growth_rate_2010_2020 <- (pop_2020 / pop_2010) ^ (1/10) - 1

message(paste("Growth rate 2000-2010:", round(growth_rate_2000_2010 * 100, 3), "% per year"))
message(paste("Growth rate 2010-2020:", round(growth_rate_2010_2020 * 100, 3), "% per year"))

# Create state population for all years
state_population <- tibble(year = 1985:2022) %>%
  mutate(
    state_population = case_when(
      # 1985-1999: Extrapolate backward from 2000 using 2000-2010 growth rate
      year < 2000 ~ pop_2000 / ((1 + growth_rate_2000_2010) ^ (2000 - year)),
      # 2000: Actual Census data
      year == 2000 ~ pop_2000,
      # 2001-2009: Linear interpolation between 2000 and 2010
      year > 2000 & year < 2010 ~ pop_2000 + (pop_2010 - pop_2000) * (year - 2000) / (2010 - 2000),
      # 2010: Actual Census data
      year == 2010 ~ pop_2010,
      # 2011-2019: Linear interpolation between 2010 and 2020
      year > 2010 & year < 2020 ~ pop_2010 + (pop_2020 - pop_2010) * (year - 2010) / (2020 - 2010),
      # 2020: Actual Census data
      year == 2020 ~ pop_2020,
      # 2021-2022: Extrapolate forward from 2020 using 2010-2020 growth rate
      year > 2020 ~ pop_2020 * ((1 + growth_rate_2010_2020) ^ (year - 2020))
    )
  )

message("\nState population estimates for all years (1985-2022):")
print(state_population)

# ============================================
# Step 3: Calculate Zip Code Fractions
# ============================================

message("\nCalculating zip code population fractions...")

# For each zip code, calculate average fraction across observed years
zip_fractions <- florida_zip_observed %>%
  left_join(
    state_population %>% rename(state_pop_at_year = state_population),
    by = "year"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    population_fraction = population / state_pop_at_year
  ) %>%
  group_by(zip_code) %>%
  summarise(
    zip_name = first(zip_name),
    avg_population_fraction = mean(population_fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_year_observed = min(year),
    max_year_observed = max(year),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

message(paste("Calculated fractions for", n_distinct(zip_fractions$zip_code), "zip codes"))
message("Sample fractions:")
print(head(zip_fractions, 10))

# Verify the join will work
message("\nVerifying zip_fractions has the required columns:")
message(paste("Columns:", paste(names(zip_fractions), collapse = ", ")))

# ============================================
# Step 4: Scale State Population to Zip Codes
# ============================================

message("\nScaling state population to zip code level...")

# Build the complete dataset step by step to debug
temp1 <- expand_grid(
  year = 1985:2022,
  zip_code = unique(florida_zip_observed$zip_code)
)

message(paste("After expand_grid: nrow =", nrow(temp1)))

temp2 <- temp1 %>%
  left_join(state_population, by = "year")

message(paste("After joining state_population: nrow =", nrow(temp2)))
message(paste("NAs in state_population:", sum(is.na(temp2$state_population))))

temp3 <- temp2 %>%
  left_join(zip_fractions, by = "zip_code")

message(paste("After joining zip_fractions: nrow =", nrow(temp3)))
message(paste("Columns in temp3:", paste(names(temp3), collapse = ", ")))
message(paste("NAs in avg_population_fraction:", sum(is.na(temp3$avg_population_fraction))))

temp4 <- temp3 %>%
  mutate(
    # Scale state population by zip code's average fraction
    population_estimated = state_population * avg_population_fraction
  )

message(paste("After calculating population_estimated: nrow =", nrow(temp4)))
message(paste("NAs in population_estimated:", sum(is.na(temp4$population_estimated))))
message(paste("Sample population_estimated values:"))
print(head(temp4 %>% select(year, zip_code, state_population, avg_population_fraction, population_estimated), 10))

# Add observed data where available
temp5 <- temp4 %>%
  left_join(
    florida_zip_observed %>% select(zip_code, year, population) %>% mutate(is_observed = TRUE),
    by = c("zip_code", "year")
  )

message(paste("After joining observed data: nrow =", nrow(temp5)))

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

florida_zip_complete <- temp5 %>%
  mutate(
    # Clean ZIP: digits only, last 5
    zip_code = str_sub(str_replace_all(zip_code, "\\D", ""), -5, -1),

    # Decide population source correctly
    population_final = case_when(
      is_observed == TRUE & !is.na(population) & population > 0 ~ population,
      TRUE ~ population_estimated
    ),

    population_final = round(population_final)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(zip_code),
    nchar(zip_code) == 5
  ) %>%
  select(year, zip_code, population = population_final) %>%
  # Collapse duplicates safely
  group_by(year, zip_code) %>%
  summarise(
    population = max(population, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(zip_code, year)
```

Export the ZIP–year population panel
```{r}
dir.create("data/population", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

attr(florida_zip_complete, "source") <- "Census ZCTA + ACS 5-year, interpolated"
attr(florida_zip_complete, "created_on") <- Sys.time()
attr(florida_zip_complete, "notes") <- "Observed population used when available; otherwise estimated. Zeros retained for pre-existence ZCTAs."
saveRDS(florida_zip_complete,  "data/population/florida_zip_population_1985_2022.rds")

saveRDS(
  florida_zip_complete,
  file = "data/population/florida_zip_population_1985_2022.rds"
)
``
```
